mapper.sql: id, task_id, employee_name, mobile, employee_no, project_department, position_name, performance, confirm_status, feedback_status
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_employee_performance_record WHERE mobile = #{mobile} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_employee_performance_sms_evidence (mobile, scene, sms_code, sms_send_biz_id, captcha_trace_id, ip_address, user_agent, sent_at, verified_at) VALUES (#{mobile}, #{scene}, #{smsCode}, #{smsSendBizId}, #{captchaTraceId}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{sentAt}, #{verifiedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, mobile, scene, sms_code, sms_send_biz_id, captcha_trace_id, ip_address, user_agent, sent_at, verified_at, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM tb_employee_performance_sms_evidence WHERE mobile = #{mobile} AND scene = #{scene} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_employee_performance_confirm_log (task_id, record_id, mobile, confirm_type, performance_snapshot, sms_evidence_id, sms_send_biz_id, sms_verified_at, ip_address, user_agent) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{recordId}, #{mobile}, #{confirmType}, #{performanceSnapshot}, #{smsEvidenceId}, #{smsSendBizId}, #{smsVerifiedAt}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent})

INSERT INTO tb_employee_performance_confirm_log (task_id, record_id, mobile, confirm_type, performance_snapshot, sms_evidence_id, sms_send_biz_id, sms_verified_at, ip_address, user_agent) VALUES
(#{entity.taskId}, #{entity.recordId}, #{entity.mobile}, #{entity.confirmType}, #{entity.performanceSnapshot}, #{entity.smsEvidenceId}, #{entity.smsSendBizId}, #{entity.smsVerifiedAt}, #{entity.ipAddress}, #{entity.userAgent})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_employee_performance_record SET confirm_status = #{confirmStatus}, last_confirm_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND mobile = #{mobile} AND is_deleted = 0 AND confirm_status IN ('PENDING_CONFIRM', 'PENDING_SECOND_CONFIRM') AND feedback_status = 'NONE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_employee_performance_feedback (task_id, record_id, mobile, feedback_content, performance_snapshot, ip_address, user_agent, status, is_deleted) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{recordId}, #{mobile}, #{feedbackContent}, #{performanceSnapshot}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{status}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_employee_performance_record SET confirm_status = 'FEEDBACK_SUBMITTED', feedback_status = 'PENDING', last_feedback_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND mobile = #{mobile} AND is_deleted = 0 AND confirm_status = 'PENDING_CONFIRM' AND feedback_status = 'NONE'
